redemptionType: Daily primary redemption via Securitize / Transfer Agent
liquidityNotes: BUIDL has daily primary-market redemption through the Securitize / Transfer Agent workflow. RWA.xyz lists minimum redemption amount as 250000 USD and redemption fee as 0%. Liquidity score is set at the lower bound of the T+1/daily redemption band because redemption is not permissionless instant liquidity, investor access is restricted to U.S. Qualified Purchasers, transfer/whitelist controls exist, and secondary-market liquidity is limited.
